TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 02
#2 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, M. NORMAN, CSR - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDED; CASE SUBMITTED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS PETRONILA HERNANDEZ, JAIME SOLORZANO AND XIOMARA SOLORZANO, AGAINST PLAINTIFF ENRIQUE CISNEROS, PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANTS PAY TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $2903.88 ON OR BEFORE 5 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. NOTE THAT JUDGMENT REFLECTS A 20% REDUCTION OF RENT AND DAMAGES DUE TO THE UNINHABITABILITY OF THE PREMISES. IN THE EVENT THAT JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $2903.88 IS NOT PAID TO PLAINTIFF, BY DEFENDANTS, WITHIN FIVE DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT, THEN JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 123 CUVIER STREET, LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, RENT AND DAMAGES FOR THE SUM OF $2903.88, COSTS OF SUIT, AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE.
MOTION TO MODIFY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CISNEROS, ENRIQUE HEARING SET FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO MODIFY JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF AUG-29-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLUS ADDITIONAL DAMAGES AT $21.67 PER DAY, TOTAL $1074.84

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, PETRONILA SOLORZANO, XIOMARA SOLORZANO, JAIME THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 123 CUVIER ST, LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,059.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,059.90, LEASE FORFEITED, & COSTS PER COST BILL
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $440.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE OCT-05-1994, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CISNEROS, ENRIQUE
